name: Behavior Mediator
description: Canonical trace-aware JSONL behavior stream for OpenClaw.

outputFile.description: Absolute path to the canonical behavior-events.jsonl output file.

capturePreviewChars.description: Maximum characters stored in redacted preview fields.

captureNetwork.description: Whether to capture non-LLM fetch evidence as network spans.

traceEval.description: Whether to trace eval and Function constructor activity.

redactHeaders.description: Case-insensitive HTTP header names that should always be redacted.

redactPatterns.description: Regular expression patterns used to redact secrets from previews.
